title: 5013-G Income Tax and Benefit Guide for Non-Residents and Deemed Residents of Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## 5013-G Income Tax and Benefit Guide for Non-Residents and Deemed Residents of Canada

## Temporary measure – Fax for Non-resident and Deemed resident returns
Due to international mail delays, the CRA is temporarily accepting non-resident and deemed resident income tax returns through fax. You can fax your return to the Tax Centre applicable to your country of residence.
You can view this publication in:
- HTML 5013-g-25e.html
For people with visual impairments, the following alternate formats are also available:
- E-text 5013-g-25e.txt
- Large print 5013-g-lp-25e.pdf
Last update: 2026-01-20
Previous-year versions are also available.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
